en: This is now the second letter that I am writing to you, beloved. In both of them I am stirring up your sincere mind by way of reminder,
zh: 親愛的，我現在寫給你們的是第二封信。在這兩封信中，我都用提醒的話來激發你們真誠的心，

en: that you should remember the predictions of the holy prophets and the commandment of the Lord and Savior through your apostles,
zh: 叫你們記起聖先知說過的話，和主救主藉著使徒傳給你們的誡命。

en: knowing this first of all, that scoffers will come in the last days with scoffing, following their own sinful desires.
zh: 最重要的，你們應當知道：在末後的日子，必定有好譏笑的人出來，隨著自己的私慾譏笑說：

en: They will say, "Where is the promise of his coming? For ever since the fathers fell asleep, all things are continuing as they were from the beginning of creation."
zh: “他要降臨的應許在哪裡呢？因為自從列祖睡了以來，萬物依然存在，與起初創造的時候一樣。”

en: For they deliberately overlook this fact, that the heavens existed long ago, and the earth was formed out of water and through water by the word of God,
zh: 他們故意忘記這事：在太古的時候，因著 神的話，就有了天，和從水而出、藉水而成的地。

en: and that by means of these the world that then existed was deluged with water and perished.
zh: 當時的世界，因被水淹沒而消滅了。

en: But by the same word the heavens and earth that now exist are stored up for fire, being kept until the day of judgment and destruction of the ungodly.
zh: 但現在的天地，還是因著同樣的話可以存留，直到不敬虔的人受審判和遭滅亡的日子，用火焚燒。

en: But do not overlook this one fact, beloved, that with the Lord one day is as a thousand years, and a thousand years as one day.
zh: 親愛的，這一件事你們不可忘記：在主看來，一日如千年，千年如一日。

en: The Lord is not slow to fulfill his promise as some count slowness, but is patient toward you, not wishing that any should perish, but that all should reach repentance.
zh: 主決不耽延他的應許，像有些人以為他是耽延的一樣；其實他是寬容你們，不願有一人滅亡，卻願人人都悔改。

en: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief, and then the heavens will pass away with a roar, and the heavenly bodies will be burned up and dissolved, and the earth and the works that are done on it will be exposed.
zh: 但主的日子必要像賊一樣來到。在那日，天必轟然一聲地消失，所有元素都因烈火而融化；地和地上所有的，都要被燒毀 。

en: Since all these things are thus to be dissolved, what sort of people ought you to be in lives of holiness and godliness,
zh: 這一切既然都要這樣融化，你們應當怎樣為人，過著聖潔和敬虔的生活，

en: waiting for and hastening the coming of the day of God, because of which the heavens will be set on fire and dissolved, and the heavenly bodies will melt as they burn!
zh: 等候並催促 神的日子降臨呢？因為在那日，天要被火焚燒就融化了，所有元素都因烈火而融解！

en: But according to his promise we are waiting for new heavens and a new earth in which righteousness dwells.
zh: 但是我們按照他所應許的，等候新天新地，有公義在那裡居住。

en: Therefore, beloved, since you are waiting for these, be diligent to be found by him without spot or blemish, and at peace.
zh: 所以，親愛的，你們既然等候這些事，就當殷勤努力，使你們沒有污點，沒有瑕疵，安然見主。

en: And count the patience of our Lord as salvation, just as our beloved brother Paul also wrote to you according to the wisdom given him,
zh: 並且要以我們的主恆久忍耐為給人得救的機會，就如我們所親愛的弟兄保羅，按照所賜給他的智慧，寫給你們的一樣；

en: as he does in all his letters when he speaks in them of these matters. There are some things in them that are hard to understand, which the ignorant and unstable twist to their own destruction, as they do the other Scriptures.
zh: 他在一切書信上，都講論這些事。在這些書信中，有些難明白的地方，那不學無術和不穩定的人加以曲解，好像曲解別的經書一樣，就自取滅亡。

en: You therefore, beloved, knowing this beforehand, take care that you are not carried away with the error of lawless people and lose your own stability.
zh: 所以，親愛的，你們既然預先知道了，就要謹慎，免得受惡人的錯謬引導，就從自己堅固的地步上墜落。

en: But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. To him be the glory both now and to the day of eternity. Amen.
zh: 你們卻要在我們的主、救主耶穌基督的恩典和知識上長進。願榮耀歸給他，從現在直到永遠。阿們。
